ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category the size chart applies to */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Size system used (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size chart is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size chart is designed for (e.g., Adult, Child, Teen) */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type the size chart is designed for (e.g., Slim, Regular, Plus) */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "chart_version" TEXT /* Version of the size chart */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the size chart was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last modified */,
  "chart_status" TEXT /* Status of the size chart (e.g., Active, Inactive, Draft) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the size chart */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the size chart */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the size chart (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_system FOREIGN KEY ("size_system") REFERENCES size_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the size system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size system */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Primary unit of measurement (e.g., Inches, Centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart detail */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the detail belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "bust_in" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "bust_cm" TEXT /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_in" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_in" TEXT /* Shoulder width in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder width in centimeters */,
  "inseam_in" TEXT /* Inseam length in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam length in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_details_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the fit model */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the fit model represents (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the fit model represents (e.g., Adult, Child, Teen) */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type the fit model represents (e.g., Slim, Regular, Plus) */,
  "height_in" TEXT /* Height of the fit model in inches */,
  "height_cm" TEXT /* Height of the fit model in centimeters */,
  "weight_lb" TEXT /* Weight of the fit model in pounds */,
  "weight_kg" TEXT /* Weight of the fit model in kilograms */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the fit model (e.g., Active, Inactive, Archived) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fit model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the fit model */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the fit model */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the fit model (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_model_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit model measurement */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fit model the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust_in" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_in" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_in" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_in" REAL /* Shoulder width in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width in centimeters */,
  "inseam_in" REAL /* Inseam length in inches */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam length in centimeters */,
  "measurement_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the measurement */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_model_measurements_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES fit_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_testing" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit test */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment being tested */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fit model used for testing */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the fit test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the fit test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the fit test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the fit test (e.g., Passed, Failed, In Progress) */,
  "test_conducted_by" INTEGER /* User who conducted the fit test */,
  "test_conducted_at" TEXT /* Location where the fit test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_testing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES fit_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_testing_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the garment belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category the garment belongs to */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the garment */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the garment */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the garment */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the garment */,
  "garment_description" TEXT /* Description of the garment */,
  "garment_status" TEXT /* Status of the garment (e.g., In Production, Out of Stock) */,
  "garment_image" TEXT /* Image of the garment */,
  "garment_video" TEXT /* Video of the garment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the garment */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category the style belongs to */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "style_image" TEXT /* Image representing the style */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the style */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being accessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fit model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, approve) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES fit_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_model_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fit model the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., Front, Back, Side) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_model_images_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES fit_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_model_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fit model the video belongs to */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "video_size" REAL /* Size of the video in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of the video (e.g., Walk, Spin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_model_videos_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES fit_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_model_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fit model the document belongs to */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "doc_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Measurement Sheet, Fit Guidelines) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_model_documents_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES fit_models ("model_id")
)
